name: Beef Arlesienne
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Boneless Pot Roast, cut into 1/2 inch slices
1 can (4 oz) Sliced Mushrooms and Juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a Dutch oven or electric frying pan.
2. Add meat and brown well on both sides.
3. Pour off the fat.
4. Add the remaining ingredients to the pan.
5. Cover tightly and simmer for 2 1/2 to 3 hours.
Serves: 6
Source: "Mountain Measures" --Junior League of Charleston, WV
ed. 1974
